---
title: "Assignment 1"
---

# Assignment 1

```{r}
1 + 1
```

My first assignment has two parts.

## (c)

## Write a Custom Summary Function
```{r}
data(mtcars) 
head(mtcars) 
```
```{r}
compute_stats \<- function(x) { result\<-list( mean = mean(x), median = median(x), variance = var(x), IQR = IQR(x), minimum = min(x), maximum = max(x) ) return(result) } compute_stats(mtcars\$mpg)
```

## Applying the Function Using a Loop
